display.purpose: The "Hello, [name]" greeting only. One per screen.

title.purpose: Section headers and the note-editor text field.

body.purpose: Note content, card copy, settings text.

label.purpose: The uppercase type badge on memory cards.

mono.purpose: Masked secret values and the sync code.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: The composer bar and the note-editor modal only — signals "above the page," not decoration.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: The one easing curve used everywhere in the system.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Below this, base font drops from 17px to 16px. The app is designed mobile-first at a 480px max-width regardless of viewport.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Save / Restore-from-backup / Turn-on-backup / active segmented option.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #de7356; color: #2b2620; border: none; border-radius: 999px; padding: 8px 18px; font-family: 'EB Garamond', serif; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:active { opacity: 0.7; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: default; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: none; color: #2b2620; border: 1px solid rgba(43,38,32,0.22); border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 16px; font-family: 'EB Garamond', serif; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { opacity: 0.7; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: The one deliberate exception to the single-accent rule — destructive actions never use terracotta.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { background: #e5484d; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 10px; padding: 12px; font-family: 'EB Garamond', serif; font-size: 15px; cursor: pointer; }

components.name: Category Tile
components.description: Home/Brain category tile — icon badge, title, count. Active state swaps to a terracotta border + wash background.
components.css: .ds-tile { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 14px; border-radius: 16px; background: #f6f2e7; border: 1px solid rgba(43,38,32,0.1); font-family: 'EB Garamond', serif; color: #2b2620; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; } .ds-tile--active { background: #f8ddd3; border-color: #de7356; } .ds-tile-icon { width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 9px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid rgba(43,38,32,0.22); color: #de7356; flex: 0 0 auto; } .ds-tile-text { display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 0; } .ds-tile-title { font-size: 16px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-tile-sub { font-size: 12.5px; color: #948a72; margin-top: 2px; }

components.name: Memory Card
components.description: Brain tab list item — type badge, text, tags, top-right delete.
components.html:
Note

Wifi password is Xk29!qz

#wifi#password
components.css: .ds-memory-card { position: relative; border: 1px solid rgba(43,38,32,0.1); border-radius: 10px; padding: 12px 14px; background: transparent; font-family: 'EB Garamond', serif; color: #2b2620; } .ds-memory-meta { display: flex; font-size: 12px; opacity: 0.6; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-type-badge { text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; border: 1px solid rgba(43,38,32,0.22); border-radius: 4px; padding: 1px 5px; } .ds-memory-text { margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-tags { display: flex; gap: 6px; } .ds-tag { font-size: 12px; opacity: 0.7; }

components.name: Toggle Switch
components.description: Settings on/off control — terracotta track when checked.
components.css: .ds-toggle { position: relative; display: inline-flex; width: 44px; height: 26px; } .ds-toggle input { position: absolute; inset: 0; opacity: 0; margin: 0; cursor: pointer; } .ds-toggle-track { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: rgba(43,38,32,0.22); border-radius: 999px; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-toggle input:checked + .ds-toggle-track { background: #de7356; } .ds-toggle-thumb { position: absolute; top: 3px; left: 3px; width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: 50%; background: #fff; transition: transform 150ms ease; } .ds-toggle input:checked + .ds-toggle-track .ds-toggle-thumb { transform: translateX(18px); }

components.name: Secret Span
components.description: Tap-to-reveal masked value (passwords, PINs) inside note text — terracotta-wash pill, monospace.
components.css: .ds-secret-span { font-family: ui-monospace, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 0.9em; background: rgba(222,115,86,0.16); border: none; border-radius: 4px; padding: 1px 6px; color: inherit; cursor: pointer; letter-spacing: 1px; }

components.name: Segmented Control
components.description: Light/Dark/System appearance picker — terracotta fill on the active segment.
components.css: .ds-segmented { display: flex; gap: 4px; background: #ede7db; border: 1px solid rgba(43,38,32,0.22); border-radius: 12px; padding: 3px; } .ds-seg { flex: 1; padding: 7px 0; background: none; border: none; border-radius: 9px; font-family: 'EB Garamond', serif; cursor: pointer; color: #2b2620; } .ds-seg--active { background: #de7356; }

narrative.overview:
Brain 2 reads like a personal ledger, not a productivity dashboard: warm paper background, ink-brown (or ink-cream, in dark) body text, hairline borders doing almost all the separating work. Against that quiet neutral field sits exactly one accent — a warm terracotta, used the way a ledger uses red ink: sparingly, on the entries that matter (an active state, a primary action, an icon), never as decoration. This follows Claude's own brand language directly — a warm rust accent (Crail-family orange) against off-white/near-black neutrals, deliberately with no blues anywhere in the system — adapted to Brain 2's own palette and EB Garamond serif voice.

The system explicitly rejects the corporate-SaaS look: no gradient hero metrics, no blue/purple accent, no dense toolbars or data tables. It's closer to a notebook than an admin panel — calm, warm, and precise, matching Brain 2's own product personality.
keyCharacteristics: One accent only. Terracotta (#de7356) is the single saturated color in the entire system.
Flat by default. Shadow is reserved for the two elements genuinely floating above the page.
Full light/dark parity. The terracotta accent is the one constant across both themes.
Generous, soft rounding. Pills for actions, 16-20px radii for cards and the modal.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Terracotta is the only saturated color anywhere in the system. A gold/tan accent existed earlier in this project's history and has been fully retired.

rules.name: The No-Blue Rule
rules.body: No blue or purple appears anywhere in Brain 2's palette, matching Claude's own brand language.

rules.name: The Single-Voice Rule
rules.body: One serif family (EB Garamond), no second typeface for contrast. Hierarchy comes from size, weight, and the 10px uppercase label.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Nothing gets a shadow just for being a card. A shadow is earned by actually floating above the page.

dos: Do use terracotta (#de7356 / var(--icon-color)) for every icon, active state, and primary button.
Do keep shadows to the two floating elements (composer, modal); everything else uses a 1px hairline border.
Do use the 999px pill radius for primary actions and 16-20px radii for cards/tiles/the modal.
Do let EB Garamond carry the whole hierarchy through size and weight.
Do use opacity-only transitions for tap feedback and card entrances.
donts: Don't introduce a second accent color. No gold, no blue, no purple.
Don't add a shadow to a card "to make it pop."
Don't reach for a second typeface for contrast or hierarchy.
Don't build gradient-hero-metric sections, dense toolbars, or data-table-dense views.
Don't use a side-stripe (border-left) as a colored accent anywhere.
